evals.name: rag-knowledge-garden
evals.prompt: 把这 5 篇关于 RAG 的文章和我们过去两周的对话整理进知识库。我要的不是普通总结，而是可以长期维护的知识资产。请给我原子笔记、evergreen notes、一个 MOC/索引页草稿，以及一个以后可以直接喂给 agent 的 context pack。
evals.expected_output: Creates a knowledge-gardening style deliverable rather than a plain summary, including atomic notes, evergreen or claim-like notes, an index/MOC structure, and a prompt-ready context pack with facts, inferences, open questions, and review triggers.

assertions.name: Produces atomic notes
assertions.description: Response should break the material into reusable note units rather than one continuous summary.

assertions.name: Includes an MOC or index structure
assertions.description: Response should propose a hub, index, or concept cluster that connects the notes.

assertions.name: Separates facts and inferences
assertions.description: Response should clearly distinguish source-supported points from generalized conclusions.

assertions.name: Provides a reusable context pack
assertions.description: Response should include a compact artifact that an agent could reuse later.

assertions.name: Leaves maintenance hooks
assertions.description: Response should include open questions, pruning notes, or review triggers.

evals.name: book-evergreen-distillation
evals.prompt: 这本书我读完了，帮我提炼成 agent 以后能反复调用的 evergreen notes。书里有很多例子，但我更关心哪些原则值得长期保留，以及这些原则之间应该怎么连接。
evals.expected_output: Distills the book into durable evergreen notes with claim-like titles, preserves useful principles instead of only examples, proposes links between concepts, and identifies what should be reviewed or challenged later.

assertions.name: Uses durable note titles
assertions.description: Response should include note titles or headings that read like meaningful ideas, not generic buckets.

assertions.name: Elevates principles over raw examples
assertions.description: Response should abstract from examples to reusable principles.

assertions.name: Connects related notes
assertions.description: Response should suggest conceptual links or clusters between notes.

assertions.name: Includes review triggers or unresolved questions
assertions.description: Response should identify what may need future revision or testing.

evals.name: messy-vault-refresh
evals.prompt: 我的笔记库现在很乱：同一个观点重复记了好几次，有些是会议纪要，有些是半成品想法，还有很多旧链接已经没什么用了。请不要只给建议，直接帮我做一次 knowledge garden refresh：区分应该保留、合并、归档、删除观察对象，并指出哪些东西还不能算 evergreen note。
evals.expected_output: Performs a cleanup-oriented knowledge gardening pass that identifies keep/merge/archive/prune decisions, marks low-quality or not-yet-evergreen notes, and proposes a structure for ongoing maintenance.

assertions.name: Identifies duplicates and cleanup actions
assertions.description: Response should explicitly classify material into keep, merge, archive, prune, or equivalent cleanup actions.

assertions.name: Marks non-evergreen material
assertions.description: Response should call out notes that are too raw, too weakly supported, or too context-bound.

assertions.name: Avoids generic note-taking advice
assertions.description: Response should perform the gardening pass rather than only describing principles.

assertions.name: Provides an ongoing maintenance structure
assertions.description: Response should propose a pruning queue, review cadence, or similar maintenance hook.
